132.body:

}

public class Main { static void greet(String name) { System.out.println("Hi " + name); } public static void main(String[] args) { greet("Aung Aung"); greet("Su Su"); }

98.title: ၁) void Method

99.body:
public class Main { static int add(int a, int b) { return a + b; } static double average(int a, int b, int c) { return (a + b + c) / 3.0; } public static void main(String[] args) { int sum = add(10, 20); double avg = average(80, 90, 70); System.out.println("Sum = " + sum); System.out.println("Average = " + avg); }
}
